checklist.title: Are all KZG proofs generated by compute_cells_and_kzg_proofs_polynomialcoeff valid for their corresponding cells and cosets?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Identify the SG-019 implementation. 2. For each generated (cell, proof) pair, invoke verify_cell_kzg_proof and confirm True. 3. Test edge cases: zero polynomial, max coefficients, boundary indices. 4. Attempt falsification through subtle corruption. 5. Verify commitment consistency.

checklist.title: Does vanishing_polynomialcoeff (SG-012) produce a polynomial that evaluates to zero at all input points with correct degree and monic form?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Identify vanishing_polynomialcoeff (SG-012). 2. Compute vanishing polynomial for test inputs. 3. Verify all evaluations equal zero. 4. Verify degree equals len(xs). 5. Verify leading coefficient is 1.

checklist.title: Can construct_vanishing_polynomial be invoked with an empty cell set or missing_cell_indices outside valid range?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Locate construct_vanishing_polynomial (SG-022). 2. Identify call sites and trace data flow. 3. Attempt invalid inputs: empty sets, out-of-range indices. 4. Verify upstream validation rejects these.

checklist.title: Does coefficient spacing by FIELD_ELEMENTS_PER_CELL correctly extend the short vanishing polynomial?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Locate function. 2. Verify spaced indices match short_zero_poly. 3. Verify non-spaced indices are zero. 4. Test edge cases.

checklist.title: Can the algebraic identity E(x) * Z(x) == P(x) * Z(x) be violated in recover_polynomialcoeff?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Identify recover_polynomialcoeff (SG-023). 2. Verify FFT domain matching. 3. Test division-by-zero handling. 4. Craft adversarial P2P input. 5. Check multiplication correctness.

checklist.title: Are P2P data column sidecars cryptographically verified via verify_cell_kzg_proof_batch before acceptance?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Trace code paths from sidecar reception. 2. Verify batch verification is called. 3. Test with fabricated KZG commitments. 4. Test with tampered cell data.

checklist.title: Can unverified sidecar fields be passed to get_data_column_sidecars_from_column_sidecar without prior verification?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Identify all call sites. 2. Verify signed_block_header verification occurs first. 3. Test with forged headers. 4. Check for bypass paths.

checklist.title: Can the custody requirement clamping formula be violated to return out-of-bounds values?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Locate get_validators_custody_requirement. 2. Verify clamping formula. 3. Test boundary conditions. 4. Check for overflow.

checklist.title: Is BALANCE_PER_ADDITIONAL_CUSTODY_GROUP validated as non-zero to prevent division by zero?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Locate constant definition. 2. Verify non-zero at compile/startup. 3. Check for runtime modification paths.

checklist.title: Does cells_and_kzg_proofs_construction maintain proof array length invariant?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Locate function in Validator SG-002. 2. Verify length assertion. 3. Test slicing bounds. 4. Attempt out-of-bounds via short proofs array.

checklist.title: Does get_data_column_sidecars produce exactly NUMBER_OF_COLUMNS sidecars with correct indices?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Identify function (Validator SG-003). 2. Verify exact sidecar count. 3. Verify index assignment. 4. Test array length matching.

checklist.title: Is each sidecar published to exactly one deterministically computed subnet?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Verify compute_subnet_for_data_column_sidecar determinism. 2. Check all sidecars published. 3. Test for wrong subnet routing.

checklist.title: Are sidecars retained for MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_DATA_COLUMN_SIDECARS_REQUESTS and served on request?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Verify retention period enforcement. 2. Test premature pruning attempts. 3. Test request serving during retention.

checklist.title: Is blob data from the EL verified by CL before entering the polynomial commitment pipeline?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Identify Engine API blob data endpoints. 2. Trace to polynomial commitment. 3. Verify validation occurs before processing. 4. Test with malformed blobs.

checklist.title: Are blocks with >50% withheld data columns correctly rejected from finalization?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Identify DAS and recovery logic. 2. Test 50% threshold (should succeed). 3. Test 51% threshold (must fail). 4. Verify attestation behavior.

checklist.title: Are cheap pre-checks applied BEFORE expensive cryptographic operations in batch KZG verification?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Locate verify_cell_kzg_proof_batch_impl. 2. Verify validation order. 3. Test with invalid lengths/indices. 4. Measure cost for invalid vs valid.

checklist.title: Can unbounded computation be triggered in recover_polynomialcoeff via controlled missing cell patterns?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Identify call sites. 2. Verify bounds on k (missing cells). 3. Test adversarial patterns. 4. Check for timeout mechanisms.

checklist.title: Do timing side channels in KZG batch verification leak information about cache state or local availability?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Identify cryptographic field operations. 2. Analyze cache lookup timing. 3. Use timing analysis tools. 4. Test over P2P.

checklist.title: Can a malicious proposer modify sidecar contents after computing valid proofs and bypass verification?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Verify independent verification by receivers. 2. Test with swapped cells. 3. Test Merkle proof verification. 4. Check for TOCTOU issues.

checklist.title: Does delayed sidecar withholding within attestation window cause incorrect finality assessments?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Identify fork choice rules. 2. Test delayed publishing scenarios. 3. Verify validators handle delays correctly.

checklist.title: Does O(n^2) cell/proof computation cause unacceptable delays with MAX_BLOBS_PER_BLOCK?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Check for FK20 algorithm usage. 2. Benchmark with max blobs. 3. Compare against time budget. 4. Test adversarial blob data.

checklist.title: Can O(k^2) vanishing polynomial construction cause recovery timeout at 50% boundary?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Determine max k value. 2. Measure execution time at max. 3. Test adversarial patterns. 4. Check for rate limiting.

checklist.title: Can excessive sidecar requests exhaust storage I/O or network bandwidth?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Identify request handlers. 2. Verify rate limiting. 3. Test burst requests. 4. Monitor resource utilization.

checklist.title: Can polynomial_eval_to_coeff be invoked with incorrect evaluation count or without bit-reversal?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Identify all call sites. 2. Verify input length validation. 3. Verify bit-reversal ordering. 4. Test with incorrect counts.

checklist.title: Can the KZG proof relationship invariant be violated in compute_kzg_proof_multi_impl?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Verify quotient polynomial correctness. 2. Validate verification equation. 3. Test edge cases. 4. Check field arithmetic.

checklist.title: Does evaluate_polynomialcoeff correctly implement Horner's method with reverse coefficient processing?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Locate SG-013. 2. Test with known values. 3. Verify reverse order. 4. Test edge cases.

checklist.title: Can get_data_column_sidecars_from_block produce invalid signed_block_header or kzg_commitments_inclusion_proof?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Locate function in Validator SG-004. 2. Verify header extraction. 3. Verify Merkle proof correctness.

checklist.title: Does compute_cells return exactly CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB cells with correct coset mapping?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Verify exact cell count. 2. Validate coset-to-cell mapping. 3. Ensure coset distinctness.

checklist.title: Do coset_for_cell elements form a valid coset h*G with correct generator order?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Verify coset_shift_for_cell computes h. 2. Verify generator order. 3. Enumerate elements. 4. Test edge cases.

checklist.title: Can add_polynomialcoeff produce incorrect degree or improper zero-padding?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Test equal degrees. 2. Test unequal degrees. 3. Test zero polynomials. 4. Verify coefficient addition.

checklist.title: Can multiply_polynomialcoeff produce incorrect degree or convolution?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Verify degree calculation. 2. Test known products. 3. Check convolution correctness. 4. Test edge cases.

checklist.title: Does divide_polynomialcoeff ensure quotient * b + remainder = a with exact division?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Identify call sites. 2. Verify exact divisibility preconditions. 3. Test inexact division handling. 4. Trace discarded remainders.

checklist.title: Does interpolate_polynomialcoeff correctly implement Lagrange interpolation?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Verify degree bound. 2. Test interpolation correctness. 3. Test duplicate x-values. 4. Check precision.

checklist.title: Does coset_fft_field maintain forward(inverse(x)) == x identity?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Verify shift/unshift ordering. 2. Test round-trip identity. 3. Test with various vectors. 4. Verify precision.

checklist.title: Is the receipt encoding type prefix byte correctly matched to transaction type?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Test all transaction types. 2. Verify prefix bytes (0x01-0x04). 3. Test legacy (no prefix). 4. Craft malicious inputs.

checklist.title: Does encode_receipt handle ALL transaction types exhaustively without silent fallthrough?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Verify exhaustive pattern matching. 2. Test with unrecognized types. 3. Check for fallthrough paths.

checklist.title: Are LegacyTransaction receipts returned raw without RLP wrapping or type-prefix?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Identify encode_receipt for legacy. 2. Verify no wrapping. 3. Verify no prefix. 4. Test various receipt sizes.

checklist.title: Does decode_receipt assert receipt type byte is in {1, 2, 3, 4}?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Locate decode_receipt. 2. Verify assertion. 3. Test with invalid bytes (0, 5, 255). 4. Verify reversion.

checklist.title: Does decode_receipt strip exactly one type prefix byte before RLP decoding?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Verify slice is receipt[1:]. 2. Check for off-by-one errors. 3. Test edge cases. 4. Verify bounds checking.

checklist.title: Are encode_receipt and decode_receipt inverse operations for all typed transactions?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Test round-trip for all types. 2. Verify field-by-field equality. 3. Test edge cases. 4. Check error handling.

checklist.title: Can Withdrawal struct fields be modified after freeze operation?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Locate slotted_freezable. 2. Verify field immutability. 3. Test mutation attempts. 4. Check unsafe bypasses.

checklist.title: Can a Withdrawal with unset fields be frozen?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Test partial construction. 2. Attempt freeze with missing fields. 3. Verify rejection.

checklist.title: Can the Header immutability invariant be violated after construction?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Verify slotted_freezable. 2. Test mutation attempts. 3. Check all 21 fields. 4. Test race conditions.

checklist.title: Are post-merge headers validated to have difficulty=0 and nonce=zero-bytes?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Locate validation logic. 2. Verify difficulty check. 3. Verify nonce check. 4. Test edge cases at merge.

checklist.title: Are post-merge headers validated to have ommers_hash equal EMPTY_OMMER_HASH?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Locate validation logic. 2. Test with non-empty ommers_hash. 3. Verify rejection.

checklist.title: Is base_fee_per_gas validated against EIP-1559 dynamic fee adjustment rules?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Locate validation logic. 2. Verify formula implementation. 3. Test with incorrect values. 4. Check boundary conditions.

checklist.title: Are blob_gas_used and excess_blob_gas validated per EIP-4844 rules?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Verify blob gas accounting. 2. Test with mismatched values. 3. Check boundary conditions.

checklist.title: Is requests_hash validated per EIP-7685 before block acceptance?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Locate validation logic. 2. Test with mismatched hashes. 3. Test all request types. 4. Verify before state changes.

checklist.title: Can Block data structure be modified after construction via P2P?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Verify slotted_freezable. 2. Test mutation of all fields. 3. Verify nested immutability. 4. Check P2P handlers.

checklist.title: Are post-merge blocks validated to have empty ommers tuple?
checklist.test_procedure: 1. Locate validation logic. 2. Test with non-empty ommers. 3. Verify rejection. 4. Test merge transition.
